mapper.select:
SELECT id, sample_name, price AS cost, required_completion_time, task_code, state, applicant, verifyer, verifyer_time FROM test_report_record WHERE 1=1 and (state = 1 or state =3)
and task_code like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')
SELECT id,task_code,verifyer,verifyer_time FROM test_report_record WHERE id =#{id}
SELECT t2.name FROM sys_user as t1 LEFT JOIN sys_ding_user as t2 ON t1.ding_user_id = t2.userid WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId}
